headline: Raymond James Financial (RJF) Reports Record Client Assets of $1.87 Trillion
summary: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (NYSE:RJF) is one of the 12 Undervalued Financial Stocks to Buy Now. On May 20, 2026, Raymond James Financial, Inc. (NYSE:RJF) CEO Paul Shoukry said client assets under administration reached a record $1.87 trillion, up 22% year-over-year and 6% sequentially, driven mainly by higher equity markets and net asset inflows. Shoukry […]
